name: XAUUSD M15 BB+RSI Mean Reversion
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when price closes outside a 20-period Bollinger Band (2.0 dev) with RSI(7) at an extreme, and BB width is in the upper 60% of its 200-bar history (not dead range), price reverts to the middle band within 30 bars with expectancy > spread+slippage. Falsified if PF<1.5 or trades<200 over a 2-year sample.

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb AND rsi7 < 15 AND bb_width_percentile > 30 AND prev_close >= prev_lower_bb
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb AND rsi7 > 85 AND bb_width_percentile > 30 AND prev_close <= prev_upper_bb

regime_filter.rationale: Avoid dead vol (no range to revert from) and avoid crisis vol (reversion fails in trend blowouts).

notes: Inspired by mean-reversion-scalper-v3 (inspiration only). Adapted to XAUUSD M15.
